Enchanted BigBoi Boxers.name: Enchanted BigBoi Boxers
Enchanted BigBoi Boxers.description: Magical underwear that expands like Hulk's pants. Upgraded once via Scroll of Upgrade.
Enchanted BigBoi Boxers.mechanics: +5 to Dexterity, +5 to Intelligence, +5 to Constitution, Level 15 Protective Shell (once per 30 hours), Freeballing Benefit (100% damage bonus to attacks below waist, 20% faster skill training below waist, cannot wear pants)

Enchanted Fang Caps of the Expectorating.name: Enchanted Fang Caps of the Expectorating Tizheruk
Enchanted Fang Caps of the Expectorating.description: Metallic vampire-like teeth caps that can be installed on incisors. Fleeting item - disappears when removed.
Enchanted Fang Caps of the Expectorating.mechanics: Increases melee bite damage by 50%, 25% chance to inflict level-5 Poisoned status per bite, 10% chance to inflict level-5 Paralyzed status per bite
Enchanted Fang Caps of the Expectorating.location: Platinum Quest Box reward, given to Mongo

Enchanted Anklet of the Fallen Oak.name: Enchanted Anklet of the Fallen Oak
Enchanted Anklet of the Fallen Oak.description: Wooden anklet with three seed-pod beads that click when shaken. The 201st Security Group elves fear this item as blasphemous.
Enchanted Anklet of the Fallen Oak.location: Looted from dead tree crawler named Nica

Scroll of Upgrade.name: Scroll of Upgrade
Scroll of Upgrade.description: Short shelf-life scroll that randomly upgrades one currently-equipped item.
Scroll of Upgrade.mechanics: Upgrades one random equipped item. Upgrade quality is better when multiple items are equipped.

100,000 Gold Coin Casino Chip.name: 100,000 Gold Coin Casino Chip
100,000 Gold Coin Casino Chip.description: Black chip with pink and purple splotches featuring the Desperado Club dagger logo. Extremely heavy.
100,000 Gold Coin Casino Chip.mechanics: Comp chip - cannot be sold or transferred. Must be played at High Roller's Roulette Table or Wheel of Fortune at Desperado Club Casino.

Xistera.name: Xistera
Xistera.description: A jai-alai scoop made of light metallic substance resembling wicker. Can be retracted into a bracer form.
Xistera.mechanics: Allows throwing projectiles at high velocity and distance. Auto-adjusts width for different projectile sizes. Retracts via pull-ring to form bracer over forearm. Compatible with Iron Punch gauntlet.

Hobgoblin Hob-Lobber (Fused).name: Hobgoblin Hob-Lobber (Fused)
Hobgoblin Hob-Lobber (Fused).description: Baseball-sized dense fragmenting bomb. Mainstay weapon of Hobgoblin Hob-Lobbing Lobbers.
Hobgoblin Hob-Lobber (Fused).mechanics: Fragmenting tossable. Status 150 (Fortified). Requires lit fuse before throwing. More practical than dynamite.
Hobgoblin Hob-Lobber (Fused).location: Purchased from Pustule at Hobgobs and Boom Sticks shop

Goblin Dynamite.name: Goblin Dynamite
Goblin Dynamite.description: Red sticks of explosive. Standard explosive option.
Goblin Dynamite.mechanics: Standard explosive damage. Less stable than hobgoblin dynamite.
Goblin Dynamite.location: Purchased from Pustule at Hobgobs and Boom Sticks shop

Hobgoblin Dynamite.name: Hobgoblin Dynamite
Hobgoblin Dynamite.description: White sticks of explosive. More powerful than regular goblin dynamite.
Hobgoblin Dynamite.mechanics: Larger yield, much more stable (80% stability). Practically mini nukes. 75% explosion chance if handled by non-skilled user.
Hobgoblin Dynamite.location: Bronze Boss Box reward from Heather fight

Hobgoblin Pus.name: Hobgoblin Pus
Hobgoblin Pus.description: Remote-controlled detonator charge. Sticky substance for attaching explosives.
Hobgoblin Pus.mechanics: Allows up to 10 simultaneous detonations per glob with one button press.

Earth Hobby Potion.name: Earth Hobby Potion
Earth Hobby Potion.description: Required reward for crawlers with domestic class. Grants random Earth-based hobby skill.
Earth Hobby Potion.mechanics: Grants Level 3 in random Earth-based hobby skill. Cannot be sold or transferred. Could be useful (Parkour, Jiu-jitsu) or useless (Stamp Collecting, Kombucha Brewing).
Earth Hobby Potion.location: Silver Earth Box reward for domestic class choice

Mongo's Tracking Collar.name: Mongo's Tracking Collar
Mongo's Tracking Collar.description: Black magical collar for pets that shows their location on the map.
Mongo's Tracking Collar.mechanics: Places orange dot on map showing pet's location anywhere.

Magical Pet Carrier.name: Magical Pet Carrier
Magical Pet Carrier.description: Square brown box the size of a Rubik's Cube with fire hydrant symbol.
Magical Pet Carrier.mechanics: Zaps pet inside where they sleep and regain strength. Can call pet back out with button press. Cost: 15,000 gold.
Magical Pet Carrier.location: Purchased from shop in skyfowl settlement

Sheol Glass Reaper Case.name: Sheol Glass Reaper Case
Sheol Glass Reaper Case.description: Protective artifact forged in the fires of Sheol, the 15th dungeon level. Sold by Spider Reaper Minions.
Sheol Glass Reaper Case.mechanics: Protects contents against most forms of abuse. Warning: 1.5% chance of being blasted with Sheol Fire spell each time opened.
Sheol Glass Reaper Case.location: Found in debris after explosion at Miss Quill's office

Kimaris Beanie Baby.name: Kimaris Beanie Baby
Kimaris Beanie Baby.description: Stuffed animal of armored man atop black horse. Extremely valuable collectible from Miss Quill's collection.
Kimaris Beanie Baby.mechanics: Highest value item in Carl's inventory when sorted by value.
Kimaris Beanie Baby.location: Miss Quill's office, stored in Sheol Glass Reaper Case

Carl's Doomsday Scenario.name: Carl's Doomsday Scenario
Carl's Doomsday Scenario.description: Unstable custom explosive created by combining overloaded soul crystal with Sheol Glass Reaper Case.
Carl's Doomsday Scenario.mechanics: Explosion Imminent status. Powerful enough to level entire city and suburbs. Cannot be stabilized. Explodes instantly when removed from inventory.

Gate Pass.name: Gate Pass
Gate Pass.description: Letter from Magistrate Featherfall allowing holder to carry corpses without guard interference.
Gate Pass.mechanics: Gets city guards off your back for carrying corpses. Only works within the township it was issued.

Mysterious Letter (Suppurating Eye).name: Mysterious Letter (Suppurating Eye)
Mysterious Letter (Suppurating Eye).description: Necroscript scroll covered in caster's blood. Already activated spy spell.
Mysterious Letter (Suppurating Eye).mechanics: Suppurating Eye spell - caster can see and hear anything near the scroll when it's outside inventory. Acts as magical spy camera.

Big Top Ticket.name: Big Top Ticket
Big Top Ticket.description: Magical ticket granting safe passage into Grimaldi's Traveling Circus Big Top.
Big Top Ticket.mechanics: Guarantees safe passage through public areas only. Safe passage can be rescinded for drunks and violent individuals.

Boom Jug.name: Boom Jug
Boom Jug.description: Moonshine jug modified into incendiary explosive. Carl's crafted item.
Boom Jug.mechanics: Shatters and ignites on impact. High material cost. Worth approximately 7,500 gold. Can be used with xistera for increased range.

Spider Shields.name: Spider Shields
Spider Shields.description: Round magical defensive items sold at the Silk Road Market.

Wisp Armor Spellbook.name: Wisp Armor Spellbook
Wisp Armor Spellbook.description: Spellbook teaching the Wisp Armor defensive spell.
Wisp Armor Spellbook.mechanics: Teaches Wisp Armor spell: reduces damage from magic attacks, provides temporary immunity to mind-control effects. Requires 5 Intelligence to read.

Hair of the Dog Potion.name: Hair of the Dog Potion
Hair of the Dog Potion.description: Hangover cure potion made from gooey weed and rubbing alcohol.
Hair of the Dog Potion.mechanics: Cures alcohol-related debuffs. Simple recipe that doesn't require alchemy table.

Pet Healing Potion.name: Pet Healing Potion
Pet Healing Potion.description: Modified healing potion that works on pets. Created by adding cinnamon and thistle rot.
Pet Healing Potion.mechanics: Add cinnamon stick to healing potion, wait 5 seconds, add thistle rot, shake. Works on pets when regular potions don't.

Poison Antidote Potion.name: Poison Antidote Potion
Poison Antidote Potion.description: Potion that cures poison status effects.
Poison Antidote Potion.mechanics: Cures poison status. Has potion cooldown timer.

Mana Regen Potion.name: Mana Regen Potion
Mana Regen Potion.mechanics: Restores mana points. Subject to potion cooldown timer.

Double Healing Potion.name: Double Healing Potion
Double Healing Potion.description: Enhanced healing potion mixed by Mordecai that also cures parasitic infestation.
Double Healing Potion.mechanics: Heals and cures parasitic infestation (like circus worms).

Confusing Fog Scroll.name: Confusing Fog Scroll
Confusing Fog Scroll.description: Single-use scroll that creates fog that confuses enemies but not allies.
Confusing Fog Scroll.mechanics: Creates billowing fog that blinds and confuses enemies. Duration based on caster's Intelligence. Allies can see through it.

Fireball or Custard Lottery Ticket.name: Fireball or Custard Lottery Ticket
Fireball or Custard Lottery Ticket.description: 50/50 chance lottery ticket that either casts Fireball or summons custard.
Fireball or Custard Lottery Ticket.mechanics: Scratch to activate. 50% chance: Level 15 Fireball spell. 50% chance: Custard.

Smoke Bomb.name: Smoke Bomb
Smoke Bomb.description: Standard concealment explosive that creates smoke screen.
Smoke Bomb.mechanics: Creates smoke for concealment. Can be affected by wind. Can be deconstructed for trap parts.

201st Security Group Uniform Shirt.name: 201st Security Group Uniform Shirt
201st Security Group Uniform Shirt.description: Black military-style button-up shirt with unit patch and nameplate. Worn by city elf cultists.
201st Security Group Uniform Shirt.mechanics: No combat stats. Identifies wearer as member of 201st Security Group (city elf cult).

Acorn of Magical Fervor.name: Acorn of Magical Fervor
Acorn of Magical Fervor.description: Acorns carried by 201st Security Group elves. Consumed to activate buff.
Acorn of Magical Fervor.mechanics: Grants Magical Fervor buff: triples mana points, increases strength, causes glowing, makes user immune to Fear spell.

Soul Crystal (C-Grade).name: Soul Crystal (C-Grade)
Soul Crystal (C-Grade).description: Elf technology crystal used as power source for Swordsmen guards.
Soul Crystal (C-Grade).mechanics: Runs on soul power from kills in the area. Recharges Swordsmen guards nightly. Shatters and stops working if touched by living flesh.

Sepsis Crown.name: Sepsis Crown
Sepsis Crown.description: Donut's purple tiara. Fleeting item that grants Intelligence bonus.
Sepsis Crown.mechanics: +5 Intelligence. Fleeting status - disappears if removed and transfers to another crawler. Destroyed during magical pulse event.

Nightgaunt Cloak.name: Nightgaunt Cloak
Nightgaunt Cloak.description: Carl's protective cloak with multiple defensive properties.
Nightgaunt Cloak.mechanics: +4 Constitution, poison immunity, anti-piercing benefit, cold resistance.

Iron Punch Gauntlet.name: Iron Punch Gauntlet
Iron Punch Gauntlet.description: Carl's summoned magical gauntlet for punching attacks.
Iron Punch Gauntlet.mechanics: +3 Strength (when formed), +1 Dexterity. Iron Punch skill. At level 10, adds Breadbasket effect (10% chance to stun).

Toe Ring of Strength.name: Toe Ring of Strength
Toe Ring of Strength.description: Ring worn on toe that boosts strength.

Strength Rings.name: Strength Rings
Strength Rings.description: Finger rings that boost strength. Carl has multiple.

Constitution Ring.name: Constitution Ring
Constitution Ring.description: Ring that boosts constitution. Katia has one that gives +15.
Constitution Ring.mechanics: Various bonuses (+1 to +15 Constitution depending on quality).

Donut's Magical Brush.name: Donut's Magical Brush
Donut's Magical Brush.description: Hairbrush that grants Constitution buff when used on Donut.

Donut's Crupper.name: Donut's Crupper
Donut's Crupper.mechanics: +2 Dexterity. Hangs like a skirt across backside.

Donut's Bracelet.name: Donut's Bracelet
Donut's Bracelet.description: Magical bracelet worn on Donut's forward leg.

Butterfly Charm.name: Butterfly Charm
Butterfly Charm.description: Magical charm that Donut wears. Only one charm can be worn at a time.

Legendary Skill Potion.name: Legendary Skill Potion
Legendary Skill Potion.description: Extremely rare potion that grants legendary skill levels.
Legendary Skill Potion.mechanics: Grants significant skill boost. Worth many million gold. Typically found in Faction Wars war chests.
Legendary Skill Potion.location: Mentioned - gifted to Maggie by the Maestro

Acute Ears Skill Potion.name: Acute Ears Skill Potion
Acute Ears Skill Potion.description: Potion that grants the Acute Ears skill.
Acute Ears Skill Potion.mechanics: Grants Level 3 Acute Ears skill: improves hearing, increases minimap info about unidentified mobs (size, type with 'somewhat-reliable' accuracy).

Clurichaun Slingshot.name: Clurichaun Slingshot
Clurichaun Slingshot.description: Carl's old ranged weapon, replaced by xistera.
Clurichaun Slingshot.mechanics: Fires small ammunition. Limited by ammunition uniformity.

Louis L'Amour Book Collection.name: Louis L'Amour Book Collection
Louis L'Amour Book Collection.description: Shrink-wrapped set of 18 paperback Western novels - The Sackett Family Saga.
Louis L'Amour Book Collection.mechanics: No combat stats. Sentimental item from Earth.

Sea Breeze Candle.name: Sea Breeze Candle
Sea Breeze Candle.description: Scented candle from Earth, doesn't actually smell like the sea.
Sea Breeze Candle.mechanics: No combat stats. Comfort item reminding Donut of home.

Cat Tree.name: Cat Tree
Cat Tree.description: Large cat tree with scratching posts, platforms, and hammock. Fancier than Donut's original.
Cat Tree.mechanics: No combat stats. Comfort/rest item for Donut. Portable - can be stored in inventory.

Cactus Plant.name: Cactus Plant
Cactus Plant.description: Small cactus in clay pot with yellow spikes. $3.99 from Home Depot.

Clockwork Triplicate Spell.name: Clockwork Triplicate Spell
Clockwork Triplicate Spell.description: Spell that creates two clockwork duplicates of Mongo.
Clockwork Triplicate Spell.mechanics: Creates two clockwork copies of target pet that act independently. Copies eventually fall apart. No tooltip difference between original and copies.

Magic Missile Spell.name: Magic Missile Spell
Magic Missile Spell.description: Donut's primary attack spell. At level 10+ can set targets on fire.
Magic Missile Spell.mechanics: Ranged magic attack. At high levels, sets targets on fire. Currently level 9-10 for Donut.

Puddle Jumper Spell.name: Puddle Jumper Spell
Puddle Jumper Spell.description: Teleportation spell that moves party members short distances.
Puddle Jumper Spell.mechanics: Teleports party to visible location. Has cooldown/reset timer.

Fear Spell.name: Fear Spell
Fear Spell.description: Carl's intimidation spell from Compensated Anarchist class.
Fear Spell.mechanics: Causes mob to flee or lowers dexterity. Costs 3 mana. At level 5, works on groups. Can be countered by Magical Fervor.

Protective Shell Spell.name: Protective Shell Spell
Protective Shell Spell.description: Defensive dome spell from Enchanted BigBoi Boxers.
Protective Shell Spell.mechanics: Level 15 protective dome. Lasts 20 seconds. Repels physical attacks. Can trap enemies against walls. Usable once per 30 hours.

Wisp Armor Spell.name: Wisp Armor Spell
Wisp Armor Spell.description: Defensive spell that reduces magic damage and provides mind-control immunity.
Wisp Armor Spell.mechanics: Reduces damage from magic attacks. Temporary immunity to mind-control. 6-minute duration. Makes caster look ethereal.

Heal Spell.name: Heal Spell
Heal Spell.mechanics: Restores health. Does not cure poison. Uses mana points.

Torch Spell.name: Torch Spell
Torch Spell.mechanics: Creates bright light. Can scare away certain creatures. Brightness can be increased.

Cesta Punta Skill.name: Cesta Punta Skill
Cesta Punta Skill.description: Earth hobby skill for jai-alai throwing technique.
Cesta Punta Skill.mechanics: Level 3 skill in throwing with xistera scoop. Increases accuracy and throwing power.

Scutelliphily Skill.name: Scutelliphily Skill
Scutelliphily Skill.description: Donut's Earth hobby skill - collecting/identifying something (possibly plates or shields).
Scutelliphily Skill.mechanics: Level 3 skill. Exact use unclear - possibly related to embroidery knowledge (schiffli machines).

Double Tap Skill.name: Double Tap Skill
Double Tap Skill.description: Combat skill that gives chance for critical on consecutive hits.
Double Tap Skill.mechanics: If hitting monster twice in a row with same attack, second hit has chance for critical damage.
Double Tap Skill.location: Granted by Enchanted Anklet of the Fallen Oak

Cockroach Skill.name: Cockroach Skill
Cockroach Skill.description: Survival skill from Former Child Actor class.
Cockroach Skill.mechanics: Level 5: Guaranteed one free survive from fatal hit per fight (left near death). Level 10: First fatal strike does no damage.

9 Lives Benefit.name: 9 Lives Benefit
9 Lives Benefit.description: Cat racial benefit providing damage reduction.
9 Lives Benefit.mechanics: Halves damage from first 9 physical attacks per day.

Character Actor Skill.name: Character Actor Skill
Character Actor Skill.description: Core skill of Former Child Actor class allowing specialty choices each floor.
Character Actor Skill.mechanics: Level 3. Each floor, choose a class specialty. AI rolls to determine how many skills/spells granted. Higher skill level = better results. Loses specialty skills between floors.

Manager Benefit.name: Manager Benefit
Manager Benefit.description: Class benefit that binds a game guide as personal manager.
Manager Benefit.mechanics: Game guide (Mordecai) instantly teleports to any saferoom the crawler is in. Permanent for remainder of dungeon.
Manager Benefit.location: Donut's benefit (from Former Child Actor class)

Pathfinder Skill.name: Pathfinder Skill
Pathfinder Skill.description: Navigation skill that helps find important locations.
Pathfinder Skill.mechanics: Makes finding stairwells, shops, and guilds easier. Opens map in wide area.
Pathfinder Skill.location: Various class options (Artist Alley Mogul gives Level 5)

Escape Plan Skill.name: Escape Plan Skill
Escape Plan Skill.description: Navigation skill from Compensated Anarchist class.
Escape Plan Skill.mechanics: Level 5. Shows hidden doors more readily. Grants access to Dungeon Locator (concealed map legends at major intersections).

Bomb Surgeon Skill.name: Bomb Surgeon Skill
Bomb Surgeon Skill.mechanics: Allows cutting dynamite into smaller, less potent bombs. Can deconstruct smoke bombs for trap parts.

Backfire Skill.name: Backfire Skill
Backfire Skill.description: Trap handling skill from Compensated Anarchist class.
Backfire Skill.mechanics: Level 5. Allows picking up and deconstructing traps. Can use materials for own purposes. Triggering mechanisms are valuable.

Hide in Shadows Skill.name: Hide in Shadows Skill
Hide in Shadows Skill.mechanics: Level 2. Allows hiding in shadows for stealth. Less useful with visible party members.

Iron Punch Skill.name: Iron Punch Skill
Iron Punch Skill.description: Melee combat skill for powerful punches.
Iron Punch Skill.mechanics: At level 10, adds Breadbasket effect (10% chance to stun for several seconds on solid blow).

Limb Regeneration Benefit.name: Limb Regeneration Benefit
Limb Regeneration Benefit.description: Class benefit from Bomb Squad Tech class.
Limb Regeneration Benefit.mechanics: Allows regeneration of lost limbs. (Not chosen by Carl)

Freeballing Benefit.name: Freeballing Benefit
Freeballing Benefit.description: Combat enhancement benefit from upgraded Enchanted BigBoi Boxers.
Freeballing Benefit.mechanics: 100% damage bonus to attacks originating below waist. 20% faster training for below-waist skills. Only one layer of clothing allowed to cover crotch area.

Second Fuel Tank Ability.name: Second Fuel Tank Ability
Second Fuel Tank Ability.mechanics: Absorbs damage and reflects some back. Triggers randomly, limited to once per fight.

Rush Ability.name: Rush Ability
Rush Ability.mechanics: Uses body as battering ram. Can only be used once per 30-hour day. Can blast through walls.

Puppy Dog Ability.name: Puppy Dog Ability
Puppy Dog Ability.description: Inherent charm ability from extremely high Charisma (100+).
Puppy Dog Ability.mechanics: Makes men mad with desire. Effect strengthens the longer in presence. Countered by self-inflicting bone fracture.

Blood Magic.name: Blood Magic
Blood Magic.description: Signet's unique magic system using blood sacrifices.
Blood Magic.mechanics: Requires proper sacrifice to cast spells. Caster chooses sacrifice, tattoos take blood and form. Can only cast summoning once per night.

The Final War Spell.name: The Final War Spell
The Final War Spell.description: Three-part heirloom spell Miss Quill was preparing to cast.
The Final War Spell.mechanics: Three-part spell cast over generations. Third act takes three nights to cast. Requires thousands of mana points. Would unleash beasts to slaughter all except those protected by feathers (skyfowl).

Suppurating Eye Spell.name: Suppurating Eye Spell
Suppurating Eye Spell.description: Common lich spell for remote surveillance.
Suppurating Eye Spell.mechanics: Caster reads spell then leaks bodily fluid onto surface. Can then see and hear anything near the spilled fluid. Like placing spy camera.
